requirements.task_name: Add the newest fantasy novel under $18 to your main reading list
requirements.task_description: Locate fantasy books, filter to show only titles priced at $18 or less, sort by newest publication date, and add the single newest fantasy novel to the 'Main Reading List'. Success is achieved when exactly one book (the newest fantasy novel under $18) is added to the 'Main Reading List'.

requirements.task_name: Favorite the longer of two mystery novels priced under $20 using the compare feature
requirements.task_description: Search for mystery novels under $20, add the first two results to a comparison view, determine which book has more pages, and add only the longer book to your favorites. Success is achieved when exactly one mystery novel under $20—the one with the higher page count out of the first two results—is added to your favorites list.

requirements.task_name: Review a highly rated short work under 120 pages with a 4-star rating
requirements.task_description: Find a short work (such as a short story or novella) with a rating of at least 4.5 stars and fewer than 120 pages, then submit a 4-star review with a written comment. Success is achieved when one qualifying book has a new 4-star rating and a text review submitted through the on-site review form.

requirements.task_name: Register for the earliest online event in March 2025 and add a specific note
requirements.task_description: Use the events calendar to find online-only events in March 2025, select the earliest-dated one, and complete the registration form including a note that says 'Ask about sequel'. Success is achieved when the earliest online event in March 2025 has been registered for with the required note included in the form.

requirements.task_name: Create a 3-book sci-fi eBook bundle under $10 each and add it to the cart
requirements.task_description: Filter for science fiction eBooks costing less than $10 each, select the three highest-rated titles, add them to a custom bundle, and place that bundle in the cart. Success is achieved when a bundle containing exactly 3 science fiction eBooks, each priced under $10, is added to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Send a contact message about a bulk order of 25 paperbacks
requirements.task_description: Use the contact form to send a message about purchasing 25 paperback copies, selecting the 'Bulk Orders' topic and including a subject that references 25 paperbacks. Success is achieved when a contact form submission is made with the 'Bulk Orders' topic, a subject line mentioning 25 paperbacks, and a message body describing the request.

requirements.task_name: Add the two cheapest highly rated young adult books from 2018–2020 to a 'Summer 2025' wishlist
requirements.task_description: Filter for young adult books published between 2018 and 2020 with a rating of at least 4.0 stars, sort by price to find the cheapest options, then add the two lowest-priced books to a wishlist named 'Summer 2025' (creating that wishlist if it does not already exist). Success is achieved when exactly two qualifying young adult books are saved in a wishlist labeled 'Summer 2025'.

requirements.task_name: Save the most recent 'Writing Process' blog post with 5+ comments to your reading list
requirements.task_description: Browse the blog, filter for posts tagged 'Writing Process', identify the most recent post that has at least 5 comments, and save that single post to your reading list. Success is achieved when the newest 'Writing Process' post with a comment count of 5 or more is added to your reading list.
